feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Approve and reject not showing up in fiori my Inbox app
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I have made another user as my substitute to approve purchase order in fiori app, but he can view the purchase order but he can t approve or reject the purchase order. The colleague has rights to fiori. Can you help me?

My colleague's view 

My view

entry.title: My catalog does not appear in fiori launchpad
entry.content:
I am customizing my launchpad for the first time and I created a catalog with 3 applications and also a group to add the corresponding catalog.
Then when I enter the PFCG transaction to assign the applications to a role I can't find the catalog I created.
I tried to enter the catalog ID and it is not there either.
Does anyone know what could be happening?

my catalog does not appear hereif i search by id i get this message

I look forward to your help, greetings.

entry.title: Re: My catalog does not appear in fiori launchpad
entry.content:
Hi  @MaximoSanchez 

Firstly, i am not able to understand the German at some places 
 
Did you get connect with Security in your team ?

As per my observation you missed this thing 
Semantic Object, 
T-Code: /n/ui2/semobj 

As i created a blog on this check out the steps of sequence:
https://suggu-sandeep.medium.com/sap-fiori-tile-creation-2023-2dc76cb952a8

If same issue let's come back & comment over here again...

Thanks, 
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: Invalidate SAPUI5 Client Cache
entry.content:
We developed a bundle of SAPUI5 applications deployed on cloud foundry runtime and published through SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition launchpad.

Is there any way to tell the browser to invalidate the cache when a new version of the application has been deployed? The cache-buster mechanism does not seem to be applicable in this scenario.

Best regards.

entry.title: Flexible workflow for Purchase Requisition- Account assignment category
entry.content:
When we use flexible workflow based on accounting objects at Purchase requisition item level, we would like to have few more account assignment categories to be listed like 1, 2, 3,4 etc. We tried implementing KBA 2767845 but didn't workout.

Any other option available to use ?

entry.title: The function can not be called in sapui5. Shortcut is not executable.
entry.content:
I have a button called EXPORT and now I need to create a shortcut to export file to excel. The short cut is Ctrl+Alt+E. When I press the shortcut it have to call the function "onCommandExecution" which will check the ID condition and execute the function "onExportToExcel". I have been made debugging an I the ID was not called in the function. In other words the function onCommandExecution has not been called. The problem have to be either in view file or in manifest file but I see that both are correct!

The problem is when I press the combination I do not get all of ctrl+alt+e. I get one of them in debugging.

Does someone have a solution please?

Thank you

 

 

//Controller.js file
		      onCommandExecution: function(oEvent) {
              var mSId = oEvent.getSource().getId();
              if (mSId === "CE_EXPORT") {
                
                  this.onExportToExcel();
              }
		  },
			onExportToExcel: function() {
			var oSettings, oSheet, aProducts;
			var aCols = [];
			aCols = this.createColumnConfig();

			aProducts = this.byId("messageTable").getModel("oMessageModel").getProperty('/');
			var oDate = new Date();
			var regex = new RegExp(",", "g");
			var aDateArr = oDate.toISOString().split("T")[0].split("-");
			var sDate = aDateArr.join().replace(regex, "");
			var aTimeArr = oDate.toISOString().split("T")[1].split(":");
			var sSeconds = oDate.toISOString().split("T")[1].split(":")[2].split(".")[0];
			var sTime = aTimeArr[0] + aTimeArr[1] + sSeconds;

			oSettings = {
				workbook: {
					columns: aCols
				},
				dataSource: aProducts,
				fileName: "export_" + sDate + sTime
			};

			oSheet = new Spreadsheet(oSettings);
			oSheet.build()
				.then(function() {
					MessageToast.show(this.getOwnerComponent().getModel("i18n").getResourceBundle().getText("excelDownloadSuccessful"));
				})
				.finally(function() {
					oSheet.destroy();
				});

		},
//view.xml file
<Page>
<footer>
			<OverflowToolbar >
				<Button icon="sap-icon://excel-attachment" text="{i18n>exportToExcelBtn}" press="onExportToExcel" tooltip="{i18n>exportToExcelBtnTooltip}"/>
			</OverflowToolbar>
		</footer>
		<dependents>
		<core:CommandExecution id="CE_EXPORT" command="Export" enabled="true" execute="onCommandExecution" />
		</dependents>
//manifest.json file
"sap.ui5": {
        "rootView": {
            "viewName": "com.volkswagen.ifdb.cc.sa.view.Main",
            "type": "XML"
        },
        "dependencies": {
            "minUI5Version": "1.65.0",
            "libs": {
                "sap.m": {},
                "sap.ui.comp": {},
                "sap.ui.core": {},
                "sap.ui.layout": {},
                "sap.ushell": {}
            }
        },
        "contentDensities": {
            "compact": true,
            "cozy": true
        },
        "commands": {
            "Export":{
                "shortcut": "Ctrl+Alt+E"
            }
        },

entry.title: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I am currently involving on a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition implementation and we have some requirements that requires custom development. These developments must built using SAPUI5. I would like confirming if it is possible to implement these developments on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. I have looked at documentation for that, but I have not found definitively answer.

Best regard,

Anthony

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: I am not able to connect to Enable Now Manager from SAP on-prem Fiori,
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have integrated companion for SAP S4 HANA On-prem. I can see help icon in Fiori. I can view standard content in Learner. I am not able to view custom simulation and I am not able to add tour, help, Whats new etc. I have integrated extended workarea. I can see context information for simulation I have recorded.
Getting below error

When I click edit icon from Fiori Home page, I am getting below popup, If I click Show in Manager Workspace, I am not able to move to manager.

Please help me to view custom content as well.

entry.title: Sample code for creating a responsive popover on hover of a table cell in SAP UI5 ?
entry.content: Sample code for creating a responsive popover on hover of a table cell in SAP UI5 ?

entry.title: How to make a field in SAP Sales order Va02 as a non editable field
entry.content:
Hello 

 

I am looking for help .. 

 

How Can I make a field example -  Customer group of ' Va02 Manage Sales order App ' screen of SAP Fiori as a non-editable field .

Please help is there any Standard solution available?

Thanks

SAP Fiori learner.

entry.title: Smart Field input change to Capital Letter
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using control configuration in smartfilterbar for F4 help using UI annotations. Now I want to make sure that F4 help field converts entered values to uppercase so that it sends uppercase letters only for value suggestions. My question is whether we have any such annotation from the UI side for this or how do we do it?

entry.title: Can we create complex transactional FIORI apps using RAP?
entry.content:
We have to migrate ESS' webdynpro applications to UI5 Fiori apps. But our webdynpro applications are very complex and bulky. We are receiving a lot of input data in non-tabular format and then processing through complex logic. There are numerous screen level validations as well. Upon processing, the data is written down in multiple standard as well as custom tables. 

Can we create such complex Fiori apps using SAP RAP Model or we should follow some other model for this task. One approach is to create multiple ODATA services without CDS view and Annotations and then process the data in individual function modules. CDS/BOPF/RAP are appropriate for tiny applications where not much front end coding is required.

For example, can we create travel expense application using SAP RAP model ?

entry.title: Last usage data for ATC objects or any specific custom objects
entry.content:
Hi SAP,
We did implemented the CCLM in SOLMAN 7.2 SP17, but we are unable to see the usage data for specific custom object or ATC results job. Could you please help to provide more information on how can we see the last used data for specific objects or ATC results objects. 

One of our Developer executed the job in ATC and same is reflected in SOLMAN CCLM Quality cockpit
Is it possible to see the last used data for specific to that specific ATC Job objects in SOLMAN CCLM?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAPUI5: How to make a column/field editable in Dialog?
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I'm new to SAPUI5 and need help with one issue.

I have a button on the UI and when the user clicks it, a dialog(wrapped in Fragment) opens. The dialog has two columns "Book" and "Quantity". I want this "Quantity" field to be editable by default, without clicking any button.
It is important not to redefine table columns on the frontend side, i.e. using CustomData (in fragment.xml) is not the answer.

Would be grateful for any useful tips and idea(s).

Thank You!

My fragment.xml

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:f="sap.ui.layout.form" xmlns:l="sap.ui.layout"
	xmlns:smartTable="sap.ui.comp.smarttable" xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:smartFilterBar="sap.ui.comp.smartfilterbar">
	<Dialog title="Books" contentWidth="65rem" contentHeight="40rem" id="idBooksDialog" showHeader="true"
		type="Standard" draggable="true" resizable="true" afterOpen="onBooksDialogAfterOpen">
		<content>
			<Page id="idBooksDialog.page" title="" showHeader="false">
				<content>
					<smartTable:SmartTable id="idBooksDialog.smartTable"
						header="{Books}" entitySet="ZC_MyBooks" tableType="ResponsiveTable"
						useVariantManagement="false" useExportToExcel="false" showRowCount="true" showVariantManagement="false" showTablePersonalisation="false"
						enableAutoBinding="true" placeToolbarInTable="true" noData="{No Books}">
						<Table id="idBooksDialog.responsiveTable" growing="true" growingScrollToLoad="true" growingThreshold="25"
							sticky="ColumnHeaders,HeaderToolbar"/>
					</smartTable:SmartTable>
				</content>
				<footer>
					<Toolbar id="idBooksDialog.toolbar">
						<content>
							<ToolbarSpacer id="idBooksDialog.toolbarSpacer"/>
						</content>
					</Toolbar>
				</footer>
			</Page>
		</content>
	</Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

entry.title: Workflow user decision step with link of FIORI screen
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am having requirement of 'Link of Fiori screen' in workflow User decision step which is available in MYINBOX. On clicking the Link in user decision step FIORI screen should appear.

Can anybody kindly guide what work is required from ODATA and FIORI side is needed.

My workflow template triggering from Odata.

Regards.

entry.title: Payee/Payer field is not showing in the Fiori app(Manage Journal Entries)
entry.content:
The payee/Payer field is not showing in the Fiori app(Manage Journal Entries), but it is showing in FBL1N using SAP GUI. What is the fix for this?

Fiori APP:

Using SAP GUI:

entry.title: Fiori Elements List report Grid table is not scrollable
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I did the above changes in my BAS to see the results list can be scrollable because it contains 20+ columns. but its not working . Can someone help me on this?

SAP Fiori

entry.title: BP transaction- table control addition
entry.content: Hi , we have added a new custom tab at company code level in BP transaction. We want to see the table control in manage_supplier_master in Fiori front end. Used BDT to add the new custom tab in BP transaction. We are able to see single custom fields but not table- control fields on front end fiori. How to acheive this?

entry.title: How to dynamically set the metaPath in an xml fragment?
entry.content:
Hello,

What is the correct syntax for dynamically setting the 'metapath' in an xml fragment for a dynamically created page?

For a little context, I have a Fiori application based on an oData V4 service that I extended with a dynamic object page (using flexible programming model), and I'm having issues setting the metapath in the xml fragment. 
Hardcoding the metapath ("_association/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem") works fine, but I need to dynamically set it.
This is the way it's currently set: 

    <macros:Table
        id="MasterDataTableID"
        metaPath="{ path: `${RapEntityAssociation}/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.LineItem` }"
        readOnly="true"
        selectionMode="Multi"
        enableFullScreen="true"
        type="ResponsiveTable"
        personalization="Sort,Filter">
    </macros:Table>

entry.title: Email Template s/4 Hana cloud with FICA
entry.content:
I'm trying to assign my email Template to be used by the system when a customer renew/buy a new subscription. However, Sap is keep using the standard email Template.

This is what I've done:

  • Created the template via "Maintain email templates" app.
  • Assigned the template to the invoice via "Assign email templates" in customizing.
  • Assigned the email template via "Define Form Template for Correspondence" in customizing for FI-CA invoice.

Any Idea what I'm doing wrong here?
